features: Scrub Your Body Deeply: Designed specifically for back skin, it is simple to use, stimulates the skin to increase blood circulation, and produces rich foam; it can effectively remove dirt and impurities on the back, unclog pores, and promote skin health
Extended Length: URAQT back washer increases the length of the bathing area to 70 cm, which can easily scrub all parts of the back, achieving maximum cleaning without the help of others

Double-sided Use: This exfoliating back scrubber can be used on both sides: it is designed with a double-layer texture, and the rough honeycomb texture on the surface can be used to remove dirt, dead skin, and more

Easy To Clean: URAQT body brush is easy to clean and keep dry, greatly reducing the survival rate of bacteria. The high-quality fiber material makes it easy to wash and dry fast, completely machine washable

Suitable for All Skin Types: The back scrubber can effectively remove the dirt on the skin surface and relieve body fatigue easily. Suitable for all skin types, and also for different groups of people, such as children, the elderly, men and women
